auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Alpha Vantage API key sent with the apikey query parameter. Claim your free key at https://www.alphavantage.co/support/#api-key.

actions.name: call_official_function
actions.description: Call a documented Alpha Vantage query function with raw JSON-facing parameters for advanced coverage.

functionName.description: The official Alpha Vantage function name to call.

additionalProperties.description: A string, number, boolean, or null query parameter value.

parameters.description: Official Alpha Vantage query parameters excluding function and apikey.

inputSchema.description: The input for calling an official Alpha Vantage function.

data.description: The parsed JSON payload or raw text payload returned by Alpha Vantage.

outputSchema.description: The raw Alpha Vantage response.

actions.name: get_daily_adjusted_time_series
actions.description: Retrieve raw daily adjusted OHLCV, dividend, and split data for a stock symbol from Alpha Vantage.

symbol.description: The stock symbol to query, such as IBM or TSCO.LON.

outputSize.description: The amount of historical data to return. Use compact for the latest 100 data points or full for the complete history.

datatype.description: The response format requested from Alpha Vantage.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving the daily adjusted time series.

data.description: The parsed JSON payload or raw text/CSV payload returned by Alpha Vantage.

outputSchema.description: The raw response returned by Alpha Vantage.

actions.name: get_daily_time_series
actions.description: Retrieve the raw daily OHLCV time series for a single stock symbol from Alpha Vantage.

symbol.description: The stock symbol to query, such as IBM or TSCO.LON.

outputSize.description: The amount of historical data to return. Use compact for the latest 100 data points or full for the complete history.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving the daily time series.

seriesType.description: The Alpha Vantage time series family represented by this response.

information.description: The summary text returned in the Meta Data block.

symbol.description: The ticker symbol that was queried.

lastRefreshed.description: The last refresh timestamp returned by Alpha Vantage.

outputSize.description: The output size returned by Alpha Vantage when the endpoint exposes it.

timeZone.description: The time zone returned in the Meta Data block.

meta.description: The metadata returned for an Alpha Vantage time series response.

timestamp.description: The trading day associated with this OHLCV record.

open.description: The open price for the period.

high.description: The high price for the period.

low.description: The low price for the period.

close.description: The close price for the period.

volume.description: The traded volume for the period.

items.description: A single OHLCV record from Alpha Vantage.

values.description: The ordered list of OHLCV records.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Alpha Vantage time series response.

actions.name: get_global_quote

symbol.description: The ticker symbol returned by Alpha Vantage.

open.description: The opening price for the latest trading session.

high.description: The highest price for the latest trading session.

low.description: The lowest price for the latest trading session.

latestTradingDay.description: The latest trading day in YYYY-MM-DD format returned by Alpha Vantage.

change.description: The absolute price change versus the previous close.

changePercent.description: The percentage price change versus the previous close.

outputSchema.description: The normalized global quote response.

actions.name: get_technical_indicator
actions.description: Retrieve raw technical indicator data using an official Alpha Vantage indicator function.

indicator.description: The technical indicator function to query.

symbol.description: The equity symbol or currency pair to analyze.

interval.description: The time interval between data points.

timePeriod.description: The number of periods used for the indicator calculation.

seriesType.description: The price series to use for the calculation.

month.description: The optional month in YYYY-MM format for intraday historical data.

fastPeriod.description: The fast period parameter for supported indicators.

slowPeriod.description: The slow period parameter for supported indicators.

signalPeriod.description: The signal period parameter for supported indicators.

fastKPeriod.description: The fast K period parameter for supported indicators.

slowKPeriod.description: The slow K period parameter for supported indicators.

slowDPeriod.description: The slow D period parameter for supported indicators.

slowKMatype.description: The slow K moving average type for supported indicators.

slowDMatype.description: The slow D moving average type for supported indicators.

fastDPeriod.description: The fast D period parameter for supported indicators.

fastDMatype.description: The fast D moving average type for supported indicators.

fastMatype.description: The fast moving average type for supported indicators.

slowMatype.description: The slow moving average type for supported indicators.

signalMatype.description: The signal moving average type for supported indicators.

matype.description: The moving average type for supported indicators.

nbdevup.description: The upper band standard deviation multiplier.

nbdevdn.description: The lower band standard deviation multiplier.

acceleration.description: The acceleration factor for supported indicators.

maximum.description: The maximum acceleration value for supported indicators.

datatype.description: The response format requested from Alpha Vantage.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving a technical indicator.

data.description: The parsed JSON payload or raw text/CSV payload returned by Alpha Vantage.

outputSchema.description: The raw response returned by Alpha Vantage.

actions.name: search_symbols
actions.description: Search supported stocks, ETFs, and mutual funds by keyword and return the best matching symbols.

symbol.description: The matched ticker symbol.

name.description: The full company or fund name.

type.description: The instrument type returned by Alpha Vantage.

region.description: The region where the instrument trades.

timezone.description: The market timezone label returned by Alpha Vantage.

matchScore.description: The string match score returned by Alpha Vantage.

matches.description: The ordered list of matching symbols.

outputSchema.description: The symbol search response.
